creator: woodsb02@freebsd.org
text:
* Copy databases/py-bsddb3: svn copy databases/py-bsddb3 databases/py3-bsddb3
 * Update to USES=python:3
 * Update to latest upstream release 6.1.1, and update distinfo
 * Update patches to work with new version
 * Take maintainership - happy to either do this myself or leave with bofh@FreeBSD.org if they prefer

 Changes:

   https://www.jcea.es/programacion/pybsddb.htm
